text:
Created attachment 156279
Unified Diff.

Hi,

Upgrade to latest version 3.5.1. 

Unfortunately, for me, I can't submit the poudriere test run log since I'm having a transitive build failure - print/libpaper is currently broken:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=199639

So, manually I'm bypassing it by doing "make -k" and ensuring that RabbitMQ 3.5.1 is built.

I do hope this is okay, but please do let me know if you need further information.

-=david=-
